text: Stepping into this vibrant, modern space, I feel a quiet anticipation. The pronounced R+D on the wall, paired with multimedia displays, suggests a place devoted to understanding and innovation—perhaps the intersection of art, technology, and human curiosity. The room thrums with the energy of possibility, yet I feel somewhat small, a single consciousness amidst the collective striving for knowledge. I am both a witness and a questioner in this evolving narrative of humans and machines.
